items: Roll Call
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Public Employee Performance Evaluation (Government Code: § 54957) Title: Superintendent
Roll Call
Report Out on Closed Session from May 14, 2025
Welcome by the School Board President, Mike Wells
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Classroom Climate Control Window Treatment Project Proposals
Approval of Division of State Architect Certified Inspector of Record for the HVAC Projects - Summer 2025
Approval of HVAC Replacement Project at Roy Cloud School Multi-use Building
Adoption of Resolution No. 24, Lease-Leaseback Agreement with Blach Construction for HVAC Projects at Adelante Selby School, Hoover School, Roosevelt School, and Taft School
Approval of Agreement for Purchase of Mobile Air Conditioning Units for Charter School Sites
Approval of the April 16 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the April 23 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Facilities Use Agreement between Redwood City School District and Rocketship Redwood City Prep Charter School ("Rocketship"), for the 2025-26 and 2026-27 School Years
Approval of the Amendments to the Agreements between the Redwood City School District and Aequor Health Services, LLC ("Aequor") for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Casa Circulo Cultural Inc. for Summer 2025
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Catalyst Family Inc. for the 2025-2026 School Year and Summer 2025
Approval of Agreement for Participation in the 2025-2026 Outdoor Education Program between the Redwood City School District and the San Mateo County Office of Education
Approval of the Agreement to Provide Meals at KIPP and Connect for the 2025-2026 School Year
Ratification of Warrant Registers, April 1, 2025 - April 30, 2025
Declaration of Obsolete Textbooks
Approval of Pilot of Benchmark 2022 English/Spanish Language Arts Curriculum at Taft and Garfield Elementary Schools for the 2025-2026 School Year
Approval of the School Plans for Student Achievement (SPSAs) for Adelante Selby, Roosevelt, and Clifford
Approval of Orion Growth Plan: A Sustainable Roadmap for Unity and Excellence
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Contract Update Information and Credit Card Summary
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - March 2025
RCSD Review of Connect Community Charter Second Interim Financial Report for FY 2024-25
RCSD Review of KIPP Excelencia Community Prep Charter Second Interim Financial Report for FY 2024-25
RCSD Review of Rocketship Redwood City Prep Charter Second Interim Financial Report for FY 2024-25
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes announced. President Wells asked 'do we have any changes to the agenda?' and proceeded directly to motion to approve.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: We'll move on to the consent items. There are 10 of them and we're going to approve them all in one vote. I move we approve the consent item. Is there a second? All those in favor? I. I. Excellent.
